aboutGame.title: What is CookieRun Classic?
paragraphs: CookieRun Classic is a casual side-scrolling runner from Devsisters that brings the original CookieRun formula to global mobile players. You control each run with jump and slide buttons while collecting Jellies, avoiding obstacles, and escaping the Witch's Oven.

Players can collect and upgrade Cookies, Pets, and Treasures, unlock stronger combinations, explore themed Episodes, and compete with runners around the world through the real-time League system. The game also features exclusive Cookies and stories inspired by Korean culture and cuisine.

explore.title: CookieRun Classic Guide Modules
explore.description: Browse the main CookieRun Classic guide modules for beginner basics, launch rewards, Cookies, combo planning, Treasures, League scoring, download notes, and coupon redemption.

modules.name: CookieRun Classic Beginner Guide
modules.description: Learn the essential controls and progression systems before starting your first run. This guide covers jumping, sliding, collecting Jellies, avoiding obstacles, and preparing your first Cookie combination.

highlights.detail: Use the two main controls: Jump to clear obstacles and Slide to pass beneath hazards.
Collect Jellies throughout each run to increase your score.
Avoid obstacles and keep running as the Cookie attempts to escape the Witch's Oven.
Collect Cookies and Pets, then upgrade Treasures to create stronger running combinations.
Enter the League when you are ready to compete for higher scores against players around the world.

modules.name: CookieRun Classic Launch Rewards
modules.description: Check the rewards announced for the worldwide launch of CookieRun Classic. These resources provide an early supply of currency and Treasure tickets for new players.

highlights.label: Crystals
highlights.detail: The worldwide launch gift includes 300 Crystals.

highlights.label: Coins
highlights.detail: The worldwide launch gift includes 100,000 Coins.

highlights.label: Tickets
highlights.detail: The worldwide launch gift includes 3 Supreme Treasure Tickets.

highlights.label: Rookie
highlights.detail: New players can access special login rewards, missions, events, and beginner buffs.

modules.name: CookieRun Classic Cookies
modules.description: Explore the collectible Cookies available in CookieRun Classic and follow newly released characters. The game includes exclusive designs inspired by Korean culture and cuisine.

highlights.label: Lotus
highlights.detail: A newly introduced Cookie connected to Pine Monk Cookie's travel party.

highlights.label: Pine
highlights.detail: A Cookie whose travel party is joined by the mysterious Lotus Root Phantom Cookie and Lotus Sitter.

highlights.label: Culture
highlights.detail: CookieRun Classic features exclusive Cookies inspired by Korean culture and Korean cuisine.

highlights.label: Collect
highlights.detail: Players can collect and develop different Cookies for use in scoring combinations.

modules.name: CookieRun Classic League Guide
modules.description: Understand the real-time competitive League and how its scoring objective differs from a normal practice run. Players compete globally by building combinations and pushing for the highest possible score.

highlights.label: League
highlights.detail: League is the game's real-time competitive mode.

highlights.label: Score
highlights.detail: The primary League objective is to achieve the highest possible running score.

highlights.label: Global
highlights.detail: League allows players to compete with runners from around the world.

highlights.label: Combos
highlights.detail: Upgraded Cookies, Pets, and Treasures can be combined before attempting higher League scores.

modules.name: CookieRun Classic Combi Planning
modules.description: Browse Cookie and Pet pairings that support stronger runs. Combi planning connects Cookie skills, Pet abilities, relay choices, and Treasure upgrades.

highlights.label: Lotus
highlights.detail: A newly introduced companion released alongside Lotus Root Phantom Cookie.

highlights.label: Pets
highlights.detail: Players can collect Pets and pair them with their favorite Cookies.

highlights.label: Pairing
highlights.detail: Cookie and Pet choices form part of each running combination.

highlights.label: Support
highlights.detail: Pets can be included with upgraded Treasures when preparing stronger scoring combinations.

modules.name: CookieRun Classic Treasures
modules.description: Learn how Treasures contribute to Cookie and Pet combinations. Upgrading Treasures is one of the official methods for making a combination more powerful.

highlights.label: Upgrade
highlights.detail: Treasures can be upgraded to improve the strength of running combinations.

highlights.label: Tickets
highlights.detail: The worldwide launch gift provides 3 Supreme Treasure Tickets.

highlights.label: Combos
highlights.detail: Treasures are used together with collected Cookies and Pets.

highlights.label: League
highlights.detail: Treasure upgrades can be prepared before competing for higher League scores.

modules.name: CookieRun Classic Download
modules.description: Find the verified mobile download pages published for CookieRun Classic by Devsisters. The game is available as a free mobile title with optional in-app purchases.

highlights.label: Android
highlights.detail: CookieRun Classic is officially available through Google Play under Devsisters Corporation.

highlights.label: iPhone
highlights.detail: The official App Store release supports iPhone.

highlights.label: iPad
highlights.detail: The official App Store release also supports iPad.

highlights.label: Size
highlights.detail: The initial iOS App Store listing reports a download size of approximately 358.1 MB.

highlights.label: Free
highlights.detail: The game is free to download and includes optional in-app purchases.

modules.name: CookieRun Classic Coupon Redemption
modules.description: Follow the official DevPlay process for redeeming CookieRun Classic coupon codes. A valid DevPlay account email or in-game Player ID is required.

highlights.detail: Open the official CookieRun Classic coupon registration page.
Enter the email address connected to your DevPlay account or enter your Player ID from the in-game settings.
Enter the CookieRun Classic coupon code and submit the form.
Check that the coupon has not expired and that the code was entered correctly.
Restart CookieRun Classic after redemption to receive the reward.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Quick answers to the most common questions about CookieRun Classic.

items.question: What is CookieRun Classic?
items.answer: CookieRun Classic is a mobile side-scrolling runner from Devsisters where players jump, slide, collect Jellies, avoid obstacles, and escape the Witch's Oven with collectible Cookies, Pets, and Treasures.

items.question: Is CookieRun Classic available on mobile?
items.answer: CookieRun Classic is available on iOS and Android through the Apple App Store and Google Play, with free download access and optional in-app purchases.

items.question: How do Cookie and Pet combos work in CookieRun Classic?
items.answer: CookieRun Classic combos combine Cookie skills, Pet abilities, Treasure upgrades, relay choices, and Power Plus effects to improve scoring and resource runs.

items.question: How do I redeem CookieRun Classic coupon codes?
items.answer: CookieRun Classic coupon codes are redeemed through the official DevPlay coupon page by entering the DevPlay account email or in-game Player ID, then submitting the code and restarting the game.

items.question: What is League in CookieRun Classic?
items.answer: CookieRun Classic League is the real-time competitive mode where players prepare upgraded Cookies, Pets, and Treasures, then compete globally for higher running scores.

finalCta.title: Ready to Master CookieRun Classic?
finalCta.description: From your first escape from the Witch's Oven to advanced Cookie, Pet, and Treasure combinations, our independent community wiki helps you farm resources, improve scores, and climb the League rankings.
